metric_caveats: Record_ids are the same 25-record validation slice used for G1-G7 and targeted examples min7.
The slice is enriched for over-unknown, short-stability, grouped-event, cluster, and no-reference boundary errors; do not compare directly to full-validation metrics.
One LLM call proposes additional explicit canonical answer options after seeing deterministic temporal candidates; deterministic selector chooses the final answer.
Deterministic temporal candidates are always retained as seed options, so LLM option filtering cannot collapse candidate recall to zero.
Raw rejected LLM options are preserved in prediction metadata for error analysis. No verifier or repair pass.
